calendar.matters:
Motion For Hearing On Writ Of Mandate Case
Off Calendar Nov-19-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Carol Thomas 415-688-5564 Petitioner in Pro Per.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. Petitioner reports she has met and conferred with the other side and has a certified letter. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER CAROL THOMAS' Motion For Hearing On Writ Of Mandate Case.

The motion for writ of mandate is OFF CALENDAR. There is no proof of service on file and plaintiff failed to provide courtesy copies of her filings in compliance with SF Local Rule 2.7B.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
